meta.title: FAQ — ImuPay Frequently Asked Questions
meta.description: Answers to the most frequent questions about ImuPay, wallet, cards and payments.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Quickly find answers to your questions about ImuPay.

questions.q: Is ImuPay secure?
questions.a: Yes. ImuPay uses AES-256 encryption and TLS 1.3, the highest banking standards. We are PCI DSS Level 1 certified for card data processing.

questions.q: Are my funds protected in case of bankruptcy?
questions.a: Yes. User funds are segregated, meaning separated from the company's operating funds. They are protected up to €100,000 under applicable regulations.

questions.q: Is ImuPay regulated?
questions.a: ImuPay is in the process of obtaining the EME (Electronic Money Institution) license from European regulators. In the meantime, we operate within the applicable regulatory framework for payment services.

questions.q: What happens if I lose my phone?
questions.a: Immediately freeze your cards from our website or call support. Your wallet remains accessible with your password. Funds remain safe.

questions.q: How do I top up my wallet?
questions.a: Via SEPA transfer, Visa/Mastercard bank card, Apple Pay or Google Pay. Top-up is generally instant (a few seconds to a few minutes).

questions.q: Which currencies are supported?
questions.a: EUR, USD, GBP, JPY and CHF. More currencies will be added soon. Conversion is at market rate + 0.5% commission.

questions.q: Is there a minimum balance?
questions.a: No. Your balance can be €0. There is no minimum balance required to keep your account open.

questions.q: How do I transfer my balance to my bank account?
questions.a: From the app, Wallet section > Withdrawal. The transfer arrives within 1-3 business days depending on your bank. SEPA transfers are free.

questions.q: How do I get a virtual card?
questions.a: From the ImuChat app, ImuPay section > Cards > New virtual card. Generated instantly, immediately usable for online purchases.

questions.q: How much does the physical card cost?
questions.a: €9.90 at order, one-time payment. Delivery within 5 business days. No annual fees.

questions.q: How do I freeze my card?
questions.a: In the app, Cards section, tap your card then 'Freeze'. The card is instantly frozen. You can unfreeze it at any time.

questions.q: Does the card work abroad?
questions.a: Yes. The Mastercard is accepted in over 210 countries. Automatic conversion at market rate + 0.5%.

questions.q: Are P2P payments really free?
questions.a: Yes, transfers between ImuChat wallets are free and instant, with no amount limits (within regulatory caps).

questions.q: Can I send money to someone who doesn't have ImuChat?
questions.a: Not yet. P2P transfers are limited to ImuChat users. You can however send an invitation link.

questions.q: How does bill splitting work?
questions.a: In the app, create a shared request, add participants and amounts. Each receives a notification and can pay in 1 tap.

questions.q: Are there transaction limits?
questions.a: Yes, regulatory limits apply depending on your identity verification level (KYC). Without KYC: €150/month. With full KYC: €10,000/month.

questions.q: What is an ImuCoin?
questions.a: An ImuCoin (IC) is the internal currency of the ImuChat ecosystem. 100 IC = €1, fixed rate. Usable throughout the ecosystem.

questions.q: Can ImuCoins lose value?
questions.a: No. The rate is fixed: 100 IC = €1 always. They are not cryptocurrencies. They are not subject to speculation.

questions.q: How do I earn free ImuCoins?
questions.a: Participate in daily quests, ImuArena contests, community challenges. Receive tips from your subscribers if you are a creator.

questions.q: Can I convert my ImuCoins to real money?
questions.a: IC → EUR conversion is reserved for certified creators, subject to conditions and above a minimum threshold. See the Creators section for details.

questions.q: What is the minimum amount to invest?
questions.a: €1 for fractional shares. €10 for ETFs. €10 for cryptocurrencies.

questions.q: Are my investments secure?
questions.a: Stock and ETF investments are held via our regulated custody partner. Crypto is stored with institutional-grade security measures. Note: investments carry capital loss risk.

questions.q: What is Alice Finance?
questions.a: Alice Finance is our financial analysis AI. It analyzes your risk profile, savings habits and suggests investments suited to your goals.

questions.q: Can I withdraw my investments at any time?
questions.a: Yes for stocks and ETFs (1-3 business days liquidation). Crypto are immediately available. Staking may have lock-up periods.

questions.q: What hardware is needed to accept ImuPay?
questions.a: None for QR Code payments — your smartphone is enough. For NFC, an NFC-compatible terminal. The terminal app works on any Android/iOS tablet or smartphone.

questions.q: When do I receive funds from payments?
questions.a: Funds are available in your dashboard within 24 business hours. Transfer to your bank account possible immediately or set up automatically.

questions.q: Are there installation or subscription fees?
questions.a: No. Only 1.5% per transaction. No fixed fees, no subscription, no installation fees.

questions.q: Can I use the API for my e-commerce?
questions.a: Yes. Our REST API is documented at developers.imuchat.app. SDKs available for PHP, Python, Node.js and others.

questions.q: I was wrongly charged. What should I do?
questions.a: Contact our support within 60 days. Dispute the transaction from the app (History section > Transaction > Dispute). We open an investigation immediately.

questions.q: How long does a refund take?
questions.a: For P2P payments: instant if the recipient agrees. For disputed card payments: 5-15 business days depending on banking procedures.

questions.q: My order didn't arrive. Can I get a refund through ImuPay?
questions.a: Yes, if you paid with your ImuChat card. First contact the merchant. If no response, open a dispute via the app within 60 days.

questions.q: How do I contact support urgently?
questions.a: 24/7 support via the app (AI + human chat). Phone: +33 1 XX XX XX XX (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm). Email: support-pay@imuchat.app

meta.title: Financial Terms — ImuPay
meta.description: General terms and conditions for ImuPay financial services.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) govern the use of ImuPay financial services offered by ImuChat SAS. By using ImuPay, you accept these conditions in their entirety.

services.title: 2. Services offered
services.content: ImuPay offers the following services: multi-currency wallet, virtual and physical payment cards, P2P payments, savings with goal vaults, investments in stocks and ETFs, purchase and use of ImuCoins, and payment solutions for merchants.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
eligibility.content: To use ImuPay, you must: be at least 18 years old, reside in the European Union, provide accurate information during registration, and undergo identity verification (KYC) procedures as required by regulations.

limits.title: 4. Transaction limits
limits.content: Regulatory limits apply according to your verification level. Without KYC: €150/month maximum. With standard KYC: €2,500/month. With full KYC: €10,000/month. These limits may be modified without notice for regulatory or security reasons.

liability.title: 5. Liability
liability.content: ImuChat SAS commits to securing your funds and data. In the event of fraud or unauthorized use reported within the required timeframes, ImuPay commits to opening an investigation and refunding you according to applicable procedures. ImuChat SAS cannot be held liable for investment losses, which carry capital loss risk.

closure.title: 6. Account closure
closure.content: You can close your ImuPay account at any time from the application. Before closing, your balance must be zero or transferred to an external IBAN. ImuChat SAS reserves the right to suspend or close an account in case of GTC violations, fraudulent activity, or at the request of competent authorities.

invest_warning.title: 7. Investment warning
invest_warning.content: Investment services offered by ImuPay carry capital loss risk. Past performance does not guarantee future performance. ImuPay is not a licensed investment advisor. Information provided by Alice Finance is for informational purposes only and does not constitute personalized financial advice.

contact.title: 8. Contact and complaints
contact.content: For any complaint relating to ImuPay financial services, contact: support-pay@imuchat.app. Complaints will be processed within 15 business days. For unresolved disputes, you can contact the AMF Mediator or the Banque de France.
